headline: A Look At West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent performance snapshot West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) has drawn investor attention after a period of solid share performance, with the stock roughly flat over the past day but higher over the past week, month and past 3 months. At a recent close of US$316.42, West Pharmaceutical Services sits on a market value of about US$22.35b, alongside reported annual revenue of US$3.22b and net income of US$542.7m from its injectable drug packaging and delivery business. See our latest analysis...

headline: GE HealthCare and UW Medicine Radiology Expand CT, MI Research Tie
summary: GEHC teams with UW Medicine Radiology to advance CT and molecular imaging, aiming to automate workflows and speed next-gen imaging to clinics.
